title: (Bearish Signal) WHD, Aroon Indicator entered a Downtrend on April 26, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
For the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that WHD's AroonDown red line is above 70 while the AroonUp green line is below 30 for three straight days. This move could indicate a strong downtrend ahead for WHD, and traders may view it as a Sell signal for the next month. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 132 similar cases, 113 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 86%. Current price $29.27 crossed the resistance line at $28.92 and is trading between $30.87 resistance and $28.92 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/24/21 - 04/26/21, the price experienced a -3% Downtrend, while the week of 04/19/21 - 04/26/21 shows a +2% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/mbgtzqh9mqv61.png?width=1531&format=png&auto=webp&s=427ee64b363b585ccb91db6af59b7b57870131b6

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on April 08, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on WHD as a result. Tickeron A.I.detected that in 37 of 46 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

WHD moved below its 50-day Moving Average on April 08, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for WHD crossed bearishly below the 50-day moving average on April 08, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted lower and could be considered a sell signal. Tickeron A.I.detected that in 5 of 7 past instances when the 10-day crossed below the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 71%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where WHD declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 76%.
